title: Ettore Fieramosca
writer: Alessandro Blasetti, Massimo D'Azeglio, Cesare Lodovici
actors: Gino Cervi, Mario Ferrari, Elisa Cegani
plot: Nationalistic, romantic war film glorifying the role played by a group of Italian mercenaries fighting on the side of the Spanish who were battling the French for control of the peninsula during the Renaissance.
